description: Viral debate on TikTok about whether Rp 8M/month salary is enough to live comfortably in major Indonesian cities. People are sharing breakdowns of their monthly expenses, some serious, some comedic.
Food accounts competing to find the best street food meals under Rp 20,000. Started in Jakarta, spreading to other cities. Format is usually a 'challenge' style video visiting multiple spots.
trending_format: multi-spot food crawl with price tags
peak_window: peaked 2 days ago, still strong engagement

description: A resurgence of the 'romanticize your life' trend but specifically focused on making mundane routines feel cinematic. Morning coffee rituals, commute playlists, simple home cooking. Aesthetic-heavy, lo-fi soundtrack.
Entrepreneurs sharing their biggest first-year mistakes. Mix of serious advice and self-deprecating humor. Comment sections are very active with people sharing their own failures.
Bandung creators racing to showcase cafes that haven't gone viral yet. The appeal is 'I found this before it blew up.' Aesthetic-focused, usually with pricing info included.
trending_format: cafe tour with dreamy visuals and price breakdown

description: People attempting to save Rp 100,000 per day for a month and documenting the struggle. Mix of motivational and comedic content as people try to cut expenses. Some are failing publicly which is driving engagement.
trending_format: daily diary or weekly recap of saving attempt
